items.name: bounce-sidebar
items.title: Bounce Sidebar
items.description: A sidebar navigation with a bouncing dot indicator that smoothly animates between items using spring physics.

items.name: color-picker
items.title: Color Picker
items.description: A blossom-style color picker with concentric petal layers, circular color bar, and arc slider for lightness control.

items.name: goo-dropdown
items.title: Gooey Dropdown
items.description: A dropdown menu with a gooey SVG filter effect that morphs a trigger pill into the panel using spring physics and CSS shape interpolation.

items.name: password-input
items.title: Password Input
items.description: A password input with an animated eye toggle that follows your cursor and blinks periodically.

items.name: ratio-slider
items.title: Ratio Slider
items.description: A split ratio slider with two color bars, a draggable divider, and responsive labels that collapse when space is tight.

items.name: scroll-indicator
items.title: Scroll Indicator
items.description: A vertical scroll progress indicator with tick marks, section labels, and a floating position readout.
